spec.title: Sys Load (5m avg)
spec.description: Busy state of all CPU cores together (5 min average)

spec.legendFormat: opening or reading a file  - Scrape fail

spec.title: CPU Busy
spec.description: Busy state of all CPU cores together

spec.legendFormat: Inactive - Memory that is completely free and ready to use
Active - Memory currently being used by a process
Cache - Memory being used to cache data, can be freed immediately if required
Wired - Memory in use by the Kernel
Free -  Memory that has been freed but is still cached since it may be used again

matcher.options: Hardware Corrupted - Amount of RAM that the kernel identified as corrupted / not working

spec.title: Sys Load (15m avg)
spec.description: Busy state of all CPU cores together (5 min average)

spec.expr:
(
  (1 - rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{job="node", mode="idle", instance="$node"}[$__interval]))
/ ignoring(cpu) group_left
  count without (cpu)( node_cpu_seconds_total{job="node", mode="idle", instance="$node"})
)

spec.title: GEOM disk read/write operations per second

spec.legendFormat: System - Processes executing in kernel mode
User - Normal processes executing in user mode
Idle - Waiting for something to happen
Nice - Niced processes executing in user mode

matcher.options: Idle - Waiting for something to happen
